# sandcastle-sandbox-base — heavy dependencies that rarely change.
# Published as ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox-base:latest
# Rebuild only when system packages, Docker, Chrome, or dev tools change.

# Build websockify-go: minimal WebSocket→TCP proxy (~5 MB static binary)
FROM golang:1.26-alpine AS websockify-builder
WORKDIR /build
COPY websockify/ .
# go mod tidy downloads deps and generates go.sum; -mod=mod allows updating go.sum at build time
RUN go mod tidy && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o websockify .

FROM ubuntu:25.10

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openssh-server sudo curl git tmux vim neovim \
    build-essential \
    jq ripgrep fd-find htop wget unzip ca-certificates net-tools iproute2 iputils-ping \
    mosh samba \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI (gh)
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
        -o /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
        > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GUI tools: TigerVNC (Xvnc = virtual X server + VNC server combined) and window manager.
# Xvnc sends the RFB banner immediately on connect, unlike x11vnc 0.9.17+ which waits
# for client data first (breaking websockify's server-speaks-first expectation).
# noVNC static files are served from the Rails app (public/novnc/), not from the sandbox.
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    tigervnc-standalone-server openbox xterm xfonts-base xfonts-100dpi xfonts-75dpi \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# websockify-go: single static binary replaces python3-websockify (~50 MB → ~5 MB)
COPY --from=websockify-builder /build/websockify /usr/local/bin/websockify

# Google Chrome (amd64) or Chromium (arm64) — Google doesn't ship a Chrome deb for arm64
ARG TARGETARCH
RUN if [ "$TARGETARCH" = "amd64" ]; then \
      apt-get update \
      && wget -q https://dl.google.com/linux/direct/google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb \
      && apt-get install -y ./google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb \
      && rm google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*; \
    else \
      # Ubuntu ships chromium as a snap-only wrapper since 19.10 — unusable in containers.
      # Pull the real chromium .deb from Debian testing (arm64 only), pinned so nothing
      # else is silently upgraded from Debian.
      apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl gpg \
      && curl -fsSL https://ftp-master.debian.org/keys/archive-key-12.asc \
           | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/debian-archive.gpg \
      && echo "deb [arch=arm64] http://deb.debian.org/debian testing main" \
           > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian-testing.list \
      && printf 'Package: *\nPin: release o=Debian\nPin-Priority: 100\n\nPackage: chromium chromium-common chromium-sandbox\nPin: release o=Debian\nPin-Priority: 500\n' \
           > /etc/apt/preferences.d/debian-chromium \
      && apt-get update \
      && apt-get install -y chromium \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*; \
    fi

# Prefer IPv4 to avoid slow/broken IPv6 connections
RUN sed -i 's/#precedence ::ffff:0:0\/96  100/precedence ::ffff:0:0\/96  100/' /etc/gai.conf

# Docker CLI + daemon (Sysbox makes this safe)
# Use manual apt repo instead of get.docker.com convenience script —
# that script tries to install ca-certificates/curl which Ubuntu 25.10 already
# has at newer versions, causing "E: Packages were downgraded".
# Pin to 'noble' — Docker has no packages for Ubuntu 25.10 (questing) yet.
RUN install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings \
    && curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc \
    && chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu noble stable" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list \
    && apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y \
         docker-ce=5:29.0.3-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble \
         docker-ce-cli=5:29.0.3-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble \
         containerd.io=1.7.27-1 \
         docker-buildx-plugin=0.24.0-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble \
         docker-compose-plugin=2.40.3-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Pin runc — multiple runc versions break inside sysbox containers:
#   runc 1.2+  — /proc/thread-self handling change (fixed in sysbox 0.6.6)
#   runc 1.3.3 — CVE-2025-52881 fix detects sysbox's virtual /proc as an
#                unsafe cross-device mount and aborts ALL container init
#                (nestybox/sysbox#973, unresolved as of Feb 2026)
# Also: containerd.io ≥ 2.x breaks sysbox-runc entirely (nestybox/sysbox#958).
# Pinned above to containerd.io=1.7.27-1 (last safe version before both
# the 1.7.28-2 behavioural change and the 2.x series). See Sandcastle issue #56.
# containerd calls /usr/bin/runc — overwriting it here pins it regardless of
# which docker-ce or containerd.io version is installed above.
RUN RUNC_VERSION="v1.1.15" \
    && ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/releases/download/${RUNC_VERSION}/runc.${ARCH}" \
       -o /usr/bin/runc \
    && chmod +x /usr/bin/runc

# Install mise + Node.js + Codex.
# mise data/config live in /usr/local/share/mise and /usr/local/etc/mise so
# all users share the same tool installs — no per-user setup needed.
# Retry: mise install/exec can fail transiently in Docker builds (exit 127).
ENV MISE_DATA_DIR=/usr/local/share/mise
ENV MISE_CONFIG_DIR=/usr/local/etc/mise
RUN curl https://mise.run | REDACTED sh \
    && mkdir -p /usr/local/etc/mise \
    && /usr/local/bin/mise use --global node@lts \
    && /usr/local/bin/mise install \
    && for attempt in 1 2 3; do \
         /usr/local/bin/mise exec -- npm install -g @openai/codex \
         && break; \
         echo "Retry $attempt: mise exec failed, retrying in 5s..."; sleep 5; \
       done

# Claude Code — standalone native binary (no Node.js dependency)
RUN VERSION=$(curl -fsSL https://storage.googleapis.com/claude-code-dist-86c565f3-f756-42ad-8dfa-d59b1c096819/claude-code-releases/latest) \
    && ARCH=$(uname -m) \
    && if [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ] || [ "$ARCH" = "arm64" ]; then PLATFORM="linux-arm64"; else PLATFORM="linux-x64"; fi \
    && curl -fsSL "https://storage.googleapis.com/claude-code-dist-86c565f3-f756-42ad-8dfa-d59b1c096819/claude-code-releases/$VERSION/$PLATFORM/claude" \
       -o /usr/local/bin/claude \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/claude

# ttyd — web terminal (two ports: 7681=tmux, 7682=shell)
RUN ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) \
    && TTYD_ARCH=$([ "$ARCH" = "arm64" ] && echo "aarch64" || echo "x86_64") \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/tsl0922/ttyd/releases/latest/download/ttyd.${TTYD_ARCH}" \
       -o /usr/local/bin/ttyd \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ttyd

# Entire CLI — git observability for AI agent sessions (https://entire.io)
RUN ARCH="$(dpkg --print-architecture)" \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/entireio/cli/releases/latest/download/entire_linux_${ARCH}.tar.gz" \
       | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin entire \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entire

# Shell config: mise activation, aliases
# Tools are in /usr/local/bin (already on PATH), no need for ~/.local/bin
# MISE_DATA_DIR and MISE_CONFIG_DIR go in /etc/environment so SSH sessions
# (which don't inherit Docker ENV) pick up the shared mise install paths.
RUN echo "MISE_DATA_DIR=/usr/local/share/mise" >> /etc/environment \
    && echo "MISE_CONFIG_DIR=/usr/local/etc/mise" >> /etc/environment \
    && echo 'eval "$(mise activate bash)"' >> /etc/bash.bashrc \
    && echo "alias yolo='claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'" >> /etc/bash.bashrc \
    && echo "alias ycodex='codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox'" >> /etc/bash.bashrc \
    && echo "alias dps='docker ps --format \"table {{.ID}}\t{{.Names}}\t{{.Image}}\t{{.State}}\t{{.Status}}\"'" >> /etc/bash.bashrc

# SSH configuration (key-only auth) — use drop-in config for Ubuntu 25.10 compatibility
# StrictModes no: the home dir is bind-mounted from the host.  Sysbox user-
# namespace UID remapping means it appears owned by nobody (not the sandbox
# user) inside the container — chown fails silently.  StrictModes would
# refuse to accept authorized_keys from a home dir it doesn't own, so we
# disable it.  There is no security regression: password auth is disabled and
# key injection is managed exclusively by entrypoint.sh.
RUN mkdir -p /var/run/sshd /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d \
    && echo "PermitRootLogin no" > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/10-sandcastle.conf \
    && echo "PubkeyAuthentication yes" >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/10-sandcastle.conf \
    && echo "PasswordAuthentication no" >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/10-sandcastle.conf \
    && echo "StrictModes no" >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/10-sandcastle.conf

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.source="https://github.com/thieso2/sandcastle"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.description="Sandcastle sandbox base image — Ubuntu 25.10 with Docker-in-Docker, SSH, and dev tools"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.licenses="MIT"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Thin layer on top of the pre-built base image.
# Changes here (entrypoint, config, scripts) build in seconds.
# To rebuild the base: trigger the "Rebuild Sandbox Base Image" workflow
# or change files in images/sandbox/base/.
FROM ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox-base:latest

ARG SANDCASTLE_VERSION=dev

# Always pull latest security patches and package updates
RUN apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bake version into the image
RUN echo "${SANDCASTLE_VERSION}" > /etc/sandcastle-version

# ssh-agent-switcher — daemon that proxies SSH agent requests to the most
# recent valid forwarded agent socket, surviving tmux detach/reattach.
ARG TARGETARCH
RUN SAS_VERSION="v1.0.1.1-tc" \
    && SAS_ARCH=$([ "$TARGETARCH" = "arm64" ] && echo "aarch64" || echo "x86_64") \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/thieso2/ssh-agent-switcher/releases/download/${SAS_VERSION}/ssh-agent-switcher-${SAS_ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" \
       | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin ssh-agent-switcher \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ssh-agent-switcher

# SSH agent forwarding: prefer ssh-agent-switcher daemon socket, fall back
# to the stable symlink maintained by sc-tmux.
RUN printf '# ssh-agent-switcher daemon socket or symlink fallback\nif [ -S "/tmp/ssh-agent.${USER}" ]; then\n    export SSH_AUTH_SOCK="/tmp/ssh-agent.${USER}"\nelif [ -S "$HOME/.ssh/agent_sock" ]; then\n    export SSH_AUTH_SOCK="$HOME/.ssh/agent_sock"\nfi\n' \
       > /etc/profile.d/ssh-agent.sh

COPY entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
COPY docker-restart.sh /usr/local/bin/docker-restart
COPY sc-tmux.sh /usr/local/bin/sc-tmux
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/docker-restart /usr/local/bin/sc-tmux

COPY startchrome.sh /usr/local/bin/google-chrome
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/google-chrome \
    && ln -sf /usr/local/bin/google-chrome /usr/local/bin/startchrome

COPY tmux.conf /etc/tmux.conf
COPY gitconfig /etc/gitconfig

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.source="https://github.com/thieso2/sandcastle"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.description="Sandcastle sandbox image — Ubuntu 25.10 with Docker-in-Docker, SSH, and dev tools"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.licenses="MIT"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.version="${SANDCASTLE_VERSION}"

EXPOSE 22 5900 6080 7681 7682
EXPOSE 60000-61000/udp

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]

# Claude Code — standalone native binary (no Node.js dependency)
RUN VERSION=$(curl -fsSL https://storage.googleapis.com/claude-code-dist-86c565f3-f756-42ad-8dfa-d59b1c096819/claude-code-releases/latest) \
    && ARCH=$(uname -m) \

    && curl -fsSL "https://storage.googleapis.com/claude-code-dist-86c565f3-f756-42ad-8dfa-d59b1c096819/claude-code-releases/$VERSION/$PLATFORM/claude" \
       -o /usr/local/bin/claude \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/claude

# ttyd — web terminal (two ports: 7681=tmux, 7682=shell)
RUN ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) \
    && TTYD_ARCH=$([ "$ARCH" = "arm64" ] && echo "aarch64" || echo "x86_64") \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/tsl0922/ttyd/releases/latest/download/ttyd.${TTYD_ARCH}" \
       -o /usr/local/bin/ttyd \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ttyd

file.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

USERNAME="${SANDCASTLE_USER:-sandbox}"
SSH_KEY="${SANDCASTLE_SSH_KEY:-}"

# Create user if not exists
if ! id "$USERNAME" &>/dev/null; then
    useradd -m -s /bin/bash -G sudo,docker "$USERNAME"
    echo "$USERNAME ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" >> /etc/sudoers.d/sandcastle
    chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/sandcastle
fi

# Allow sandbox user to update Claude Code and Codex in place via
# `claude --update` / `codex --update` without requiring sudo.
chown "$USERNAME" /usr/local/bin/claude 2>/dev/null || true

# Set up SSH authorized keys (append if not already present, preserving
# any WeTTY keys that may have been injected for other sandboxes sharing
# this user's home directory via bind mount).
# SSH_KEY may contain multiple keys separated by newlines.
if [ -n "$SSH_KEY" ]; then

# MISE_DATA_DIR and MISE_CONFIG_DIR go in /etc/environment so SSH sessions

RUN echo "MISE_DATA_DIR=/usr/local/share/mise" >> /etc/environment \
    && echo "MISE_CONFIG_DIR=/usr/local/etc/mise" >> /etc/environment \
    && echo "CLAUDE_INSTALL_DIR=/usr/local/bin" >> /etc/environment \
    && echo 'eval "$(mise activate bash)"' >> /etc/bash.bashrc \
    && echo "alias yolo='claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'" >> /etc/bash.bashrc \
    && echo "alias ycodex='codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox'" >> /etc/bash.bashrc \

input.command:
git add images/sandbox/Dockerfile images/sandbox/Dockerfile.base images/sandbox/entrypoint.sh && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: let sandbox user update Claude Code without sudo

The claude binary at /usr/local/bin/claude is installed as root during
image build, so `claude --update` falls back to ~/.local/bin (which
isn't on PATH). Fix by chowning the binary to the sandbox user at
container start, and setting CLAUDE_INSTALL_DIR=/usr/local/bin in
/etc/environment as a fallback signal.

Also adds a CACHE_DATE build arg to the thin Dockerfile so package
upgrades can be cache-busted on demand (--build-arg CACHE_DATE=...).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
Done. Two changes:

1. **`entrypoint.sh`** — `chown "$USERNAME" /usr/local/bin/claude` at container start, so `claude --update` can overwrite the binary in place without falling back to `~/.local/bin`

2. **`Dockerfile.base`** — `CLAUDE_INSTALL_DIR=/usr/local/bin` added to `/etc/environment` as a belt-and-suspenders signal to the updater

3. **`Dockerfile`** — `CACHE_DATE` build arg added so you can bust the `apt-get upgrade` cache on demand: `docker build --build-arg CACHE_DATE=$(date +%s) ...`

Both the base image and thin image need a rebuild for these to take effect. Existing running sandboxes won't get the fix until they're rebuilt (`sandcastle rebuild`).

content.content:
.github/workflows/claude.yml
.github/workflows/sandbox-base-image.yml
.github/workflows/app-base-image.yml
.github/workflows/release.yml
.github/workflows/claude-code-review.yml
.github/workflows/sandbox-image.yml

1	name: Release
2	
3	on:
4	  push:
5	    tags:
6	      - 'v*'
7	  workflow_dispatch:
8	    inputs:
9	      cli_only:
10	        description: 'Build CLI binaries only (skip Docker images)'
11	        type: boolean
12	        default: true
13	
14	env:
15	  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
16	
17	jobs:
18	  # ── Determine build matrix ────────────────────────────────────────────────
19	  prepare:
20	    if: ${{ !inputs.cli_only }}
21	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
22	    outputs:
23	      platforms: ${{ steps.platforms.outputs.value }}
24	    steps:
25	      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
26	      - name: Determine platforms
27	        id: platforms
28	        run: |
29	          MSG=$(git log -1 --format=%B)
30	          if echo "$MSG" | grep -qi '\[multi-arch\]'; then
31	            echo 'value=["linux/amd64","linux/arm64"]' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
32	          else
33	            echo 'value=["linux/amd64"]' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
34	          fi
35	
36	  # ── App image: build per platform (parallel) ──────────────────────────────
37	  app-build:
38	    needs: prepare
39	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
40	    permissions:
41	      contents: read
42	      packages: write
43	    strategy:
44	      matrix:
45	        platform: ${{ fromJson(needs.prepare.outputs.platforms) }}
46	    steps:
47	      - name: Checkout
48	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
49	
50	      - name: Set up QEMU
51	        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3
52	
53	      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
54	        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
55	
56	      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
57	        uses: docker/login-action@v3
58	        with:
59	          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
60	          username: ${{ github.actor }}
61	          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
62	
63	      - name: Extract metadata
64	        id: meta
65	        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
66	        with:
67	          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle
68	
69	      - name: Build and push by digest
70	        id: build
71	        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
72	        with:
73	          context: .
74	          platforms: ${{ matrix.platform }}
75	          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
76	          cache-from: type=gha,scope=app-build-${{ matrix.platform }}
77	          cache-to: type=gha,scope=app-build-${{ matrix.platform }},mode=max
78	          outputs: type=image,name=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle,push-by-digest=true,name-canonical=true,push=true
79	          build-args: |
80	            BUILD_VERSION=${{ github.ref_name }}
81	            BUILD_GIT_SHA=${{ github.sha }}
82	            BUILD_GIT_DIRTY=
83	            BUILD_DATE=${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}
84	
85	      - name: Export digest
86	        run: |
87	          mkdir -p /tmp/digests
88	          digest="${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}"
89	          touch "/tmp/digests/${digest#sha256:}"
90	
91	      - name: Upload digest
92	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
93	        with:
94	          name: app-digest-${{ strategy.job-index }}
95	          path: /tmp/digests/*
96	          if-no-files-found: error
97	          retention-days: 1
98	
99	  # ── App image: merge into multi-arch manifest ─────────────────────────────
100	  app-merge:
101	    needs: app-build
102	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
103	    permissions:
104	      contents: read
105	      packages: write
106	    steps:
107	      - name: Download digests
108	        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
109	        with:
110	          path: /tmp/digests
111	          pattern: app-digest-*
112	          merge-multiple: true
113	
114	      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
115	        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
116	
117	      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
118	        uses: docker/login-action@v3
119	        with:
120	          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
121	          username: ${{ github.actor }}
122	          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
123	
124	      - name: Extract metadata
125	        id: meta
126	        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
127	        with:
128	          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle
129	          tags: |
130	            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
131	            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
132	            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
133	            type=raw,value=latest
134	
135	      - name: Create manifest list and push
136	        working-directory: /tmp/digests
137	        run: |
138	          docker buildx imagetools create $(jq -cr '.tags | map("-t " + .) | join(" ")' <<< "$DOCKER_METADATA_OUTPUT_JSON") \
139	            $(printf '${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle@sha256:%s ' *)
140	
141	      - name: Inspect image
142	        run: docker buildx imagetools inspect ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle:latest
143	
144	  # ── Sandbox image: build per platform (parallel) ──────────────────────────
145	  sandbox-build:
146	    needs: prepare
147	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
148	    permissions:
149	      contents: read
150	      packages: write
151	    strategy:
152	      matrix:
153	        platform: ${{ fromJson(needs.prepare.outputs.platforms) }}
154	    steps:
155	      - name: Checkout
156	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
157	
158	      - name: Set up QEMU
159	        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3
160

file.content:
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      cli_only:
        description: 'Build CLI binaries only (skip Docker images)'
        type: boolean
        default: true

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io

jobs:
  # ── Determine build matrix ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  prepare:
    if: ${{ !inputs.cli_only }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      platforms: ${{ steps.platforms.outputs.value }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Determine platforms
        id: platforms
        run: |
          MSG=$(git log -1 --format=%B)
          if echo "$MSG" | grep -qi '\[multi-arch\]'; then
            echo 'value=["linux/amd64","linux/arm64"]' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo 'value=["linux/amd64"]' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  # ── App image: build per platform (parallel) ──────────────────────────────
  app-build:
    needs: prepare
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ${{ fromJson(needs.prepare.outputs.platforms) }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up QEMU
        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle

      - name: Build and push by digest
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: .
          platforms: ${{ matrix.platform }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha,scope=app-build-${{ matrix.platform }}
          cache-to: type=gha,scope=app-build-${{ matrix.platform }},mode=max
          outputs: type=image,name=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle,push-by-digest=true,name-canonical=true,push=true
          build-args: |
            BUILD_VERSION=${{ github.ref_name }}
            BUILD_GIT_SHA=${{ github.sha }}
            BUILD_GIT_DIRTY=
            BUILD_DATE=${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}

      - name: Export digest
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/digests
          digest="${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}"
          touch "/tmp/digests/${digest#sha256:}"

      - name: Upload digest
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-digest-${{ strategy.job-index }}
          path: /tmp/digests/*
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 1

  # ── App image: merge into multi-arch manifest ─────────────────────────────
  app-merge:
    needs: app-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - name: Download digests
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: /tmp/digests
          pattern: app-digest-*
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
            type=raw,value=latest

      - name: Create manifest list and push
        working-directory: /tmp/digests
        run: |
          docker buildx imagetools create $(jq -cr '.tags | map("-t " + .) | join(" ")' <<< "$DOCKER_METADATA_OUTPUT_JSON") \
            $(printf '${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle@sha256:%s ' *)

      - name: Inspect image
        run: docker buildx imagetools inspect ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle:latest

  # ── Sandbox image: build per platform (parallel) ──────────────────────────
  sandbox-build:
    needs: prepare
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ${{ fromJson(needs.prepare.outputs.platforms) }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up QEMU
        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox

      - name: Build and push by digest
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: images/sandbox
          platforms: ${{ matrix.platform }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          build-args: |
            SANDCASTLE_VERSION=${{ github.ref_name }}
          outputs: type=image,name=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox,push-by-digest=true,name-canonical=true,push=true

      - name: Export digest
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/digests
          digest="${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}"
          touch "/tmp/digests/${digest#sha256:}"

      - name: Upload digest
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: sandbox-digest-${{ strategy.job-index }}
          path: /tmp/digests/*
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 1

  # ── Sandbox image: merge into multi-arch manifest ─────────────────────────
  sandbox-merge:
    needs: sandbox-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - name: Download digests
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: /tmp/digests
          pattern: sandbox-digest-*
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
            type=raw,value=latest

      - name: Create manifest list and push
        working-directory: /tmp/digests
        run: |
          docker buildx imagetools create $(jq -cr '.tags | map("-t " + .) | join(" ")' <<< "$DOCKER_METADATA_OUTPUT_JSON") \
            $(printf '${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox@sha256:%s ' *)

      - name: Inspect image
        run: docker buildx imagetools inspect ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox:latest

  # ── CLI binaries: build, sign, notarize, and attach to GitHub release ──
  cli-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: vendor/sandcastle-cli/go.mod

      - name: Run GoReleaser (release)
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          version: '~> v2'
          args: release --clean
          workdir: vendor/sandcastle-cli
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}
          MACOS_SIGN_P12: ${{ secrets.MACOS_SIGN_P12 }}
          MACOS_SIGN_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.MACOS_SIGN_PASSWORD }}
          MACOS_NOTARY_ISSUER_ID: ${{ secrets.MACOS_NOTARY_ISSUER_ID }}
          MACOS_NOTARY_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.MACOS_NOTARY_KEY_ID }}
          MACOS_NOTARY_KEY: ${{ secrets.MACOS_NOTARY_KEY }}

      - name: Attach installer to release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: gh release upload ${{ github.ref_name }} installer.sh --clobber

      - name: Run GoReleaser (snapshot)
        if: ${{ !startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') }}
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          version: '~> v2'
          args: release --snapshot --clean
          workdir: vendor/sandcastle-cli
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Upload CLI binaries as artifacts
        if: ${{ !startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') }}
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: sandcastle-cli
          path: |
            vendor/sandcastle-cli/dist/Sandcastle_*/sandcastle
            vendor/sandcastle-cli/dist/checksums.txt
          retention-days: 7

name: Rebuild Sandbox Image

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      multi_arch:
        description: 'Build for linux/amd64 + linux/arm64 (slower)'
        type: boolean
        default: false
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - 'images/sandbox/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE: ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox

jobs:
  # ── Determine build matrix ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  prepare:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      platforms: ${{ steps.platforms.outputs.value }}
    steps:
      - name: Determine platforms
        id: platforms
        run: |
          if [ "${{ inputs.multi_arch }}" = "true" ]; then
            echo 'value=["linux/amd64","linux/arm64"]' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo 'value=["linux/amd64"]' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  # ── Build per platform (parallel) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  build:
    needs: prepare
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ${{ fromJson(needs.prepare.outputs.platforms) }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up QEMU
        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.IMAGE }}

      - name: Build and push by digest
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: images/sandbox
          platforms: ${{ matrix.platform }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          build-args: SANDCASTLE_VERSION=${{ github.sha }}
          outputs: type=image,name=${{ env.IMAGE }},push-by-digest=true,name-canonical=true,push=true

      - name: Export digest
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/digests
          digest="${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}"
          touch "/tmp/digests/${digest#sha256:}"

      - name: Upload digest
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: sandbox-digest-${{ strategy.job-index }}
          path: /tmp/digests/*
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 1

  # ── Merge into manifest (latest + sha tag) ─────────────────────────────────
  merge:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - name: Download digests
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: /tmp/digests
          pattern: sandbox-digest-*
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.IMAGE }}
          tags: |
            type=raw,value=latest
            type=sha,format=short

      - name: Create manifest list and push
        working-directory: /tmp/digests
        run: |
          docker buildx imagetools create \
            $(jq -cr '.tags | map("-t " + .) | join(" ")' <<< "$DOCKER_METADATA_OUTPUT_JSON") \
            $(printf '${{ env.IMAGE }}@sha256:%s ' *)

      - name: Inspect image
        run: docker buildx imagetools inspect ${{ env.IMAGE }}:latest

input.description: CI release and image build status for v0.8.94
input.command:
until gh run list --repo thieso2/Sandcastle --limit 3 --json status,name,headBranch,databaseId --jq '
  [.[] | select(.headBranch == "main" or .headBranch == "v0.8.94")] |
  if all(.status == "completed") then
    "ALL_DONE"
  else
    empty
  end
' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "ALL_DONE"; do
  gh run list --repo thieso2/Sandcastle --limit 3 --json status,name,conclusion,headBranch --jq '.[] | select(.headBranch == "main" or .headBranch == "v0.8.94") | "\(.name): \(.status) \(.conclusion // "")"' 2>/dev/null || true
  sleep 30
done
echo "=== ALL RUNS COMPLETED ==="
gh run list --repo thieso2/Sandcastle --limit 3 --json status,name,conclusion,headBranch --jq '.[] | select(.headBranch == "main" or .headBranch == "v0.8.94") | "\(.name): \(.conclusion)"'

file.content:
# Thin layer on top of the pre-built base image.
# Changes here (entrypoint, config, scripts) build in seconds.
# To rebuild the base: trigger the "Rebuild Sandbox Base Image" workflow
# or change files in images/sandbox/base/.
FROM ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox-base:latest

ARG SANDCASTLE_VERSION=dev

# Always pull latest security patches and package updates.
# CACHE_DATE is set at build time to bust the layer cache on demand.
ARG CACHE_DATE=0
RUN apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bake version into the image
RUN echo "${SANDCASTLE_VERSION}" > /etc/sandcastle-version

# ssh-agent-switcher — daemon that proxies SSH agent requests to the most
# recent valid forwarded agent socket, surviving tmux detach/reattach.
ARG TARGETARCH
RUN SAS_VERSION="v1.0.1.1-tc" \
    && SAS_ARCH=$([ "$TARGETARCH" = "arm64" ] && echo "aarch64" || echo "x86_64") \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/thieso2/ssh-agent-switcher/releases/download/${SAS_VERSION}/ssh-agent-switcher-${SAS_ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" \
       | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin ssh-agent-switcher \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ssh-agent-switcher

# SSH agent forwarding: prefer ssh-agent-switcher daemon socket, fall back
# to the stable symlink maintained by sc-tmux.
RUN printf '# ssh-agent-switcher daemon socket or symlink fallback\nif [ -S "/tmp/ssh-agent.${USER}" ]; then\n    export SSH_AUTH_SOCK="/tmp/ssh-agent.${USER}"\nelif [ -S "$HOME/.ssh/agent_sock" ]; then\n    export SSH_AUTH_SOCK="$HOME/.ssh/agent_sock"\nfi\n' \
       > /etc/profile.d/ssh-agent.sh

COPY entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
COPY docker-restart.sh /usr/local/bin/docker-restart
COPY sc-tmux.sh /usr/local/bin/sc-tmux
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/docker-restart /usr/local/bin/sc-tmux

COPY startchrome.sh /usr/local/bin/google-chrome
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/google-chrome \
    && ln -sf /usr/local/bin/google-chrome /usr/local/bin/startchrome

COPY tmux.conf /etc/tmux.conf
COPY gitconfig /etc/gitconfig

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.source="https://github.com/thieso2/sandcastle"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.description="Sandcastle sandbox image — Ubuntu 25.10 with Docker-in-Docker, SSH, and dev tools"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.licenses="MIT"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.version="${SANDCASTLE_VERSION}"

EXPOSE 22 5900 6080 7681 7682
EXPOSE 60000-61000/udp

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]

RUN SAS_VERSION="v1.0.1.1-tc" \
    && SAS_ARCH=$([ "$TARGETARCH" = "arm64" ] && echo "aarch64" || echo "x86_64") \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/thieso2/ssh-agent-switcher/releases/download/${SAS_VERSION}/ssh-agent-switcher-${SAS_ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" \
       | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin ssh-agent-switcher \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ssh-agent-switcher

# SSH agent forwarding: prefer ssh-agent-switcher daemon socket, fall back
# to the stable symlink maintained by sc-tmux.
RUN printf '# ssh-agent-switcher daemon socket or symlink fallback\nif [ -S "/tmp/ssh-agent.${USER}" ]; then\n    export SSH_AUTH_SOCK="/tmp/ssh-agent.${USER}"\nelif [ -S "$HOME/.ssh/agent_sock" ]; then\n    export SSH_AUTH_SOCK="$HOME/.ssh/agent_sock"\nfi\n' \
       > /etc/profile.d/ssh-agent.sh

COPY entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
COPY docker-restart.sh /usr/local/bin/docker-restart
COPY sc-tmux.sh /usr/local/bin/sc-tmux
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/docker-restart /usr/local/bin/sc-tmux

COPY startchrome.sh /usr/local/bin/google-chrome
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/google-chrome \
    && ln -sf /usr/local/bin/google-chrome /usr/local/bin/startchrome

COPY tmux.conf /etc/tmux.conf
COPY gitconfig /etc/gitconfig

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.source="https://github.com/thieso2/sandcastle"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.description="Sandcastle sandbox image — Ubuntu 25.10 with Docker-in-Docker, SSH, and dev tools"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.licenses="MIT"
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.version="${SANDCASTLE_VERSION}"

EXPOSE 22 5900 6080 7681 7682
EXPOSE 60000-61000/udp

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]

lines: # Always pull latest security patches and package updates.

+RUN for i in 1 2 3; do apt-get update && break || sleep 5; done \
